title: Street Fighter II
edition_pinned: Row describes the 1991 arcade Street Fighter II design lineage; genre evidence from live Steam Street Fighter 30th Anniversary Collection (app 586200), which includes SFII Hyper Fighting, observed 2026-07-13.
moat: Six-button specials and cancels turn frame knowledge into character-identity matchups.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: One control grammar supports a whole roster of matchups without per-fighter rule books.
exemplar_rationale: Defines competitive fighting-game depth via specials, zoning, and fixed kits.

evidence.claim: Steam reported 3438 all-language, all-purchase user reviews for the Street Fighter 30th Anniversary Collection listing (app 586200).
Steam appdetails genres field listed: Action.
